kept.title: A Logical Analysis of Hanabi
kept.reason: Formal logical analysis of multi-agent epistemic reasoning, relevant to structured agent reasoning.

kept.title: A Syntactic Approach to Computing Complete and Sound Abstraction in the Situation Calculus
kept.reason: Syntactic method for sound/complete abstraction in Situation Calculus; relates to formal reasoning about actions and programs.

kept.title: A Complete Algorithm for Optimization Modulo Nonlinear Real Arithmetic
kept.reason: Complete algorithm for Optimization Modulo Nonlinear Real Arithmetic, applicable to program verification.
